strategy: He takes +20% from Storm and resists Myth 60%. Hit with Storm.
Do not hoard pips: Young Morganthe Mana Burns any wizard with 4+ power pips (or more than 7 pips). Spend pips as you go rather than banking a huge attack.
Do not Feint him; he Swap Wards it back onto you.
Do not use wards: a shield makes Young Morganthe cast Power Nova then Earthquake (400 Myth AoE). Rely on hitting fast instead of defending.
He summons escalating minions (Young Morganthe, then Roberto, then Broodmother). Broodmother drains health from Time Butterfly to itself. AoE the board with Storm and keep pip counts low.
cheatNotes: He Empowers himself and hidden-casts a turn-order switch on the opening. Do not assume you move first.
A Feint on him gets Swap Warded onto you. Skip Feint here.
He summons in stages: Young Morganthe first, then Roberto, then Broodmother. Expect the board to escalate.
On Round 1 he may summon three Young Morganthes at once, skipping the stage-2 summon. Be ready for a crowded board early.
Late arrival gets a 2-turn Stun. Zone in on time.
Young Morganthe Mana Burns any wizard sitting on 4+ power pips. Do not bank pips; spend them.
She also Mana Burns anyone holding more than 7 pips. Keep your pip count low and hit steadily.
Using a ward makes her Power Nova then Earthquake for 400 Myth to all. Avoid shields; race the board down instead.
Broodmother drains 15% of Time Butterfly's max health to itself. Kill Time Butterfly before the Broodmother stage if you can.
She sometimes follows with a Dragonblade on an ally and a team Tower Shield. Expect the minions to buff up.
